Title: Amends the definition of mental health care provider for purposes of sex offenses
Summary: Amends the definition of mental health care provider for purposes of sex offenses to include persons who hold themself out to be, or provide services as if they were, licensed or registered as a psychologist, social worker, or mental health practitioner.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the penal law, in relation to the definition of mental health care provider for purposes of sex offenses
